bp35.finding: Isolated single-step clicks/moves do not trigger level 8 completion. Multi-step coordinated sequences required.

lf52.finding: Pattern extrapolation from levels 1-6 (y-progression, x 12-step intervals) does not unlock level 7. Multi-step coordinated sequences required.

summary: Clean negative. Hypothesis-driven single-step probes cannot unlock levels 8-9 for bp35 or 7-10 for lf52. The win mechanic for these levels is buried in multi-step action sequences unreachable by isolated probes.
implication: Confirms goal-predicate dependency finding from T361: without a learned is_won predicate for the next level, BFS/systematic search cannot make progress even with a 100% verified world model.
n_total_attempts: bp35: ~320 probe actions; lf52: ~150 probe actions
